titleStmt.title: SII 25.90: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 90. (A.R. No. 90 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

This inscription in Sanskrit and Tamil is written in Grantha and Tamil characters. Palaeographically, the record may be assigned to 8th-9th Centuries A.D. The Sanskrit verses at the beginning states that Tennavan-Pallavādhipa, who is also called Māṟaṉ-Āditya born at Pōḻiyūr in Pōḻiyūrdēśa made an endowment of forty Kṛishṇa-kāchā for maintainning a lamp to the deity Śūlapāṇi in the temple at Śrīsthalī.

The Tamil portion, dated in the 4th+1st year and 593rd day of the reign of Māṟañjaḍaiyaṉ records the gift of a perpetual lamp by Māṟaṉ-Āchchaṉ alias Teṉṉavaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ of Pōḻiyūr-nāḍu to be maintained in the temple of the deity Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-bhaṭāra at Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Mīkuṇḍāru in Koḻuvūr-kūṟṟam. The amount of gift is specified as 120 palam. The sabhai of Maṇaṟkkuḍi, a brahmadēya village received the interest of 40 kaḻañju and agreed to supply one uri of ghee daily measured by the śūla-nāḻi of the temple treasury to the temple of Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-bhaṭāra. Also states that the vaṇṇār of Tirupputtūr had received a kaḻañju as poliyūṭṭu.

The chief Māṟaṉ Āchchaṉ also figures in a record, of the same king, dated an year earlier, from Courtallam in Tenkasi Taluk in Tirunelveli District. (S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 4) In this record he is referred to as the araiyaṉ of Pōḻiyūr. In our inscription he is referred to also by his title Teṉṉavaṉ Pallavaraiyaṉ, Māṟaṉ-Achchaṉ is the Tamil variant of the Sanskrit name Māṟaṉ-Āditya. (Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 5) Tirukkaṟṟaḷi-bhaṭāra has been curtailed into the modern name of the temple Tiruttaḷīśvara.

It is probable that this person must have enjoyed the status of a minor chieftain of Pōḻiyūr area. This chief is totally different from śōḻāntaka-Pallavaraiyaṉ alias Māṟaṉ Ādichchaṉ of Poḻiyūr figuring in a record of Śōḻantalaikoṇḍa Vīra Pāṇḍya (acc. 946 A.D.) from Paḷḷimaḍam in Aruppukkottai Taluk of Ramanathapuram District. (See, S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 79).
The village Pōḻiyūr in the division Pōḻiyūr-nāḍu must have been included in the Mudukuḷattur or in the Paramakudi Taluk of Ramanathapuram District. (See, S.I.I., Vol. XIV, No. 5).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . poḻiyūrākhyadeśesmin poḻiyūre prasūtavān . māḷunādityarāmā
śrī tennavan pallavādhipaḥ . dīpannitya pradīptyai sikataku ṭibhava braāhmaṇebhyaḥ pradāya
catvāriśatpramānān śatadhrati caraṇotthuta varṇṇa pradhānaḥ . śrī sthalyām kraṣakācān tadudibhavi
ṣā praddhideyena vipraiḥ Ārddha prastenasiddhairi ppravihitamakarotsusthitaś śūlapāṇeḥ ....
komāṟañcaṭaiyaṟku yāṇṭu nāṉku Itaṉetirāṇṭu nāḷ Aññūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu muṉṟu I
n nāḷālk toḻuvūṟṟattu mīkuṇṭāṟṟu brahmateyam tirupputtūrt tirukkaṟṟaḷi bhaṭāraṟkku po
ḻiyūr nāṭṭup poḻiyūrt teṉṉavaṉ pallavaraiyaṉāyiṉa māṟaṉāccaṉ vacca tirunon=tā viḷakku
Oṉṟu Itaṉiṟaiyṉūṟṟirupatiṉ palam . Itaṟkku pakalum muṭṭāmal candrādityaval Erivatā
ka Ittevar paṇṭārattu cūlanāḻiyāl nicati Uriy ney Aṭṭuva brahmade
ya maṇaṟkkuṭic cavaiyār poliyūṭṭākak koṇṭa kaḻañca 4 10 nāl cūlanāḻiyā
l nicatippaṭi muṭṭāmal Uriya ney yaṭṭuvatākak koṭuttāṉ . Iva kat tirupputtūr
vaṇṇārkku poliyūṭṭāka kkuṭutta kaḻañcu Oṉṟu . Ivviḷakku ṭṭa kaṭava sabhaiyā
raiyum rakṣippār śrīpādam Eṉ śirassiṉ meliṉ ...
Digital edition of SII 25.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
